name: Align Technology, Inc.
h1: Align Technology's GCC footprint in India
lede: Align Technology runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Mumbai and Hyderabad, covering gbs and R&D, built over nineteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Align Technology office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Align Technology, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Align Technology runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Mumbai, Hyderabad), covering gbs and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: India Director - Align Innovation Center and Invisalign R&D

about.description: Align Technology's India footprint covers Mumbai and Hyderabad, spanning gbs and R&D. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Orthopedic and Prosthetic Equipment, Medical Devices and Equipment

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all thirteen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Align Technology operate in India?
faq.a: Align Technology operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India. Three are on record in total, including non-operational sites.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Align Technology have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Align Technology's India GCC footprint spans Mumbai and Hyderabad.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Align Technology run in India?
faq.a: Align Technology runs gbs and R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Align Technology's India GCCs?
faq.a: Align Technology's India centers employ in the 501 to 1,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Align Technology's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 13 leaders at Align Technology's India centers, across IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
